title: 日本ダービーの後に・≠

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (They're getting away... It shouldn't be like this! C'mon! Run! Move! Go after 'em!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Let your tenacity carry you through!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Let your tenacity carry you through!"

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...!
Damn it aaall!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow! So that's the new Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Man, this year was just as thrilling as ever! Hm?
Wh-whoa.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur looks ready to kill someone... yikes...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...It's no good.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I lost... It wasn't even a contest. I'm a pathetic
excuse for a runner...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to turn this crappy nightmare on its
head...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I shouldn't've lost by such a huge margin...
Parcae didn't predict this.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Which means... something's changed. A loss is a
loss, but...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur returns wearing a complicated
expression. I certainly can't blame her for feeling
conflicted, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: (What should I say in this situation?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has, in fact, overturned Parcae's
prediction. The only thing is, she did so with a big
loss.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm a joke.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But... facts are facts. I managed to break free of
the seven-centimeter gap that's been holdin' me
back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Even if it was in the most pathetic way ever.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well, it's not over yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I need to give Parcae the results.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Depending on what it says, my worst possible fate
could still be waitin' for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She did mention before that changing her fated
loss streak is more important than getting one win
here...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's the moment of truth. Now's when I
find out whether or not my nightmares continue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has been fiddling with her laptop ever
since we returned to the academy. After a few
more clicks and taps...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Parcae... They're givin' me an error.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, all the other functions are workin' fine... Hang
on, lemme run a systems check.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what the problem is, but they keep givin'
me an error when I try to calculate the chances of
winning my next race.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've lost the ability to see how I'll do in all of my
future races.
choice_data_list: Does that mean... your fate has changed?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Good question.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The fact stands that the seven-centimeter
calculation changed. It might be time to
acknowledge that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not hell that awaits me now, but the great
unknown.
choice_data_list: That means your senior year mi—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't get ahead of yourself. Just 'cause I can't
calculate the results, it doesn't mean my terrible
fate has changed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Anyway, we can talk about that later.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
For all we know, this change could mean even my
predicted win in the Kikuka Sho might end in
humiliation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By Parcae's original prediction, Air Shakur was set
to win the Satsuki Sho and Kikuka Sho, making
her a Twin Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But if losing big is a possibility, it's also possible
that things're gonna start lookin' up for me...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? I could lap everyone. Not that
there's any evidence of that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I almost can't believe it, but for the first time ever, Air Shakur actually looks excited about her future.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, and summer camp's right around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I already had a training regimen in mind, but I
think I'll have Parcae readjust it for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All the other functions work just fine. I can still
make use of Parcae's calculation and analysis
features. I'm in no rush to trash them just yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm also on my way to meeting all the conditions
required to win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And if I surpass those target values at summer
camp, then I might be able to achieve even better
results than expected.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...It's all a moot point, though.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So long as I don't know what's causin' the error,
there's no way of fixin' it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(And there's still one big question. What did that
991031021222 number mean? Why did it
appear, and why'd it disappear all of a sudden?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Parcae... Are you trying to tell me something?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ridiculous. Like they could do that.
